add-archetype.description: Systematic process for adding a new class archetype to the dnd.rigo.nu questionnaire system

actions: Read ARCHETYPE_CHECKLIST.md to understand the full process
Identify which class is being modified (e.g., docs/_Classes/fighter.md)
Read the class file to understand existing archetypes and structure
Search existing traits: grep -E '^\s+[a-z]+-[a-z]+:' _data/question-bank.yml | sed 's/:.*//' | sed 's/^[[:space:]]*//' | sort -u
- 1-2 NEW archetype-defining traits (what makes it UNIQUE)
- Magic type override (if different from class generic)
Validate uniqueness: New traits should capture archetype's defining characteristics
critical_reminders: ALWAYS create archetype-specific traits, not just generic ones

actions: Add archetype to profile.archetypes section in frontmatter
Only add generic section if overriding base class values
If folk-restricted: Add restriction.folk field with folk name
Add TOC link using camelCase anchor (kebab-case → camelCase)
Verify YAML indentation (2 spaces, no tabs)

steps.critical: SEARCH BEFORE CREATING - Prevent duplicate questions
actions: 5. PREFER: Add trait to 2-3 existing relevant questions
6. ONLY IF NEEDED: Create 1-2 new questions
Target: Each new trait should appear in 2-12 questions total
Use yq or manual editing to add traits to existing questions
Create new questions only when no thematically appropriate questions exist
- Verify: '📚 Loaded data: { questions: X, classes: Y }'
- Verify archetype appears in results with >0% match

commit_message_rules: Subject line: ≤50 chars, imperative mood, capitalized, no period
Blank line between subject and body
Body: Wrap at 72 chars, explain what and why
actions: git commit with proper message format
Wait 2-5 minutes for GitHub Pages deployment

common_pitfalls: Skipping Phase 3 - ALWAYS check if traits exist in question bank first
Creating duplicate questions - SEARCH before creating new questions
Using only generic traits - Add archetype-specific traits that capture uniqueness
Wrong anchor format - Must be camelCase, not PascalCase or kebab-case
Forgetting to validate - Run make test before committing
Not testing in browser - Always verify questionnaire actually works
